chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Suit No. 2169 of 2017 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on C.M.A. No. 2394/20. 2. For hearing of C.M.A. No. 13966/17. 3. For hearing of C.M.A. No. 13967/17. ------------------ 08.03.2021 Mr. Iqtidar Hussain Jafri, Advocate for plaintiff. Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, Advocate for defendant. ------------------ 1. By means of this application, the plaintiff seeks withdrawal of the instant suit unconditionally. Learned counsel for defendant records his no objection for the grant of this application. Accordingly, this application is allowed and in result thereof, the suit stands dismissed as withdrawn, alongwith pending applications. JUDGE Athar Zai
